mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (id, doc_id, kb_id, doc_status, parent_chunk_id, breadcrumb, content, content_vector, token_count, retrieval_weight, feedback_downvotes, hypothetical_questions, metadata, page_num, section_title, chunk_type, created_at) VALUES
(#{c.id}, #{c.docId}, #{c.kbId}, #{c.docStatus}, #{c.parentChunkId}, #{c.breadcrumb}, #{c.content}, #{c.contentVector,typeHandler=com.aria.knowledge.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.PgVectorTypeHandler}, #{c.tokenCount}, #{c.retrievalWeight}, #{c.feedbackDownvotes}, #{c.hypotheticalQuestions}, #{c.metadata}, #{c.pageNum}, #{c.sectionTitle}, #{c.chunkType}, #{c.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id AS chunk_id, doc_id, kb_id, content, breadcrumb, parent_chunk_id, page_num, section_title, chunk_type, 1 - (content_vector <=> #{vec}::vector) AS score FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND doc_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND retrieval_weight > 0 ORDER BY content_vector <=> #{vec}::vector LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT id AS chunk_id, doc_id, kb_id, content, breadcrumb, parent_chunk_id, page_num, section_title, chunk_type, ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector('${tsConfig}', content), plainto_tsquery('${tsConfig}', #{query})) AS score FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND doc_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND retrieval_weight > 0 AND to_tsvector('${tsConfig}', content) @@ plainto_tsquery('${tsConfig}', #{query}) ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{topK}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(token_count), 0) FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND doc_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND retrieval_weight > 0
